name: Takakita Co., Ltd.
summary: Takakita Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of agricultural machinery in Japan. It provides machines for grass baling, such as cutting round balers, variable diameter round balers, self-propelled bale wrappers, and combi bale wrappers; and machines for shredded material bailing, including round balers for chopped material, chopping whole crop harvesters, and general-purpose type forage harvesters. The company also offers compost casters, self-propelled compost casters, and power push manure spreaders for fertilizing and seeding applications; combination rakes for mowing, tedding, and raking; and radio-controlled boats, sprayers, boom movers, and offset shredders for control and weeding. In addition, it provides rear graders for plowing and leveling; self-propelled feeders, round bale cutters, milling machines, and bale feeders for feeding applications; and snow blowers. The company was formerly known as Takakita Agricultural Machinery Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takakita Co., Ltd. in 1988. Takakita Co., Ltd. was founded in 1912 and is headquartered in Nabari, Japan.
